data.title:
50% extra trade credit towards New Releases & Preorders
					New Release titles are eligible up to two weeks after launch
data.fineprint: In store only. Eligible titles are for Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Xbox Series X & PS5. Offer valid only towards games normally accepted in trade. Games must include original cases and artwork. Extra trade should cover up to the cost of the game purchased. Extra trade is to be put towards new release games or game pre-orders. Cannot be combined with any other trade offer including EDGE. No duplicate titles accepted. Trades must be in full working condition to receive full value. Subject to Manager approval. Offer subject to change at any time.

data.title: 25% extra trade towards the purchase or Pre Orders of Marvel MTG
data.fineprint: In store only. Applies only to PS5, PS4, Xbox Series X, Xbox One Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2 software traded towards Marvel MTG Pre orders and purchases. Total trade value cannot exceed cost of purchase. Cannot be combined with any other trade offer. Trades must be in full working condition to receive full value. Trades are subject to Manager approval. Refurbishment fee may apply. No substitutions will be made. No rainchecks. Offer subject to change at any time.

data.title: $15 extra trade for PS4 and XBX controllers
data.fineprint: In store only. Applies to first party PS4 Dual Shock & XBox controllers (710011, 757245). Cannot be combined with any other trade offer including EDGE. Trades must be in full working condition to receive full value. Trade subject to refurbishment charge. Trades are subject to Manager approval. Offer subject to change at any time.

data.title: Double the trade for Nintendo Switch games towards a new Nintendo Switch 2 game
data.fineprint: In store only. Cannot be combined with any other offers. Cannot be combined with EDGE. Applies to Used Nintendo Switch games when being traded towards a new Nintendo Switch 2 game. Total trade value cannot exceed cost of purchase. Max 2 Nintendo Switch games traded per new Nintendo Switch 2 game purchased to be eligible. Does not include Nintendo Switch 2 games traded towards a new Nintendo Switch 2 games. Quantity & Selection may vary by store. Offer subject to change at any time. No substitutions will be made. No rainchecks.
